label: Aurorafall Sleep Alcove
description: Aurorafall Sleep Alcove is a narrow bedroom partitioned from the habcell’s central aisle by a sliding slagcrete-panel screen set on a recessed track. A wall-bolted bunk and fold-down shelf occupy the length of one vitrified panel, their edges chamfered to resist abrasion and snagging in cramped quarters. Overhead, low conduit ribs carry insulated vox cabling and power trunking to a dim lumen strip shrouded behind a grit guard. The air remains dry and filtered, with gasketed seams and dust-trap thresholds engineered to exclude ash and electrostatic fines blown through Nocturnis Bastion’s enclosed tiers.
